texts.content:
SN56 @gradients_ai joining Quasar @QuasarModels training

Long-context stack just got real reinforcements

Decentralized SOTA actually cooking

Root Reborn will make everyone feel better since root stakers feel they have a lot of $TAO reward they haven't claimed yet,

and alpha stakers feel the pools still have a lot of $TAO the root stakers haven't claimed yet🤣

I stopped feeding the same project background to my AI every morning

Now it compounds. The more I use it, the better it gets

Ditto MCP turns one-off agents into agents that actually remember you

Live on SN118 @heydittoai:
-> One-click connect to any agent via MCP  
-> Google/Apple/X/GitHub login  
-> Native file editing — your agent can rework files in place  
-> Free backup of all artifacts  
-> Integrated with Hippius storage, Chutes inference, Desearch, peak $TAO ecosystem

DO NOT BUY SN29

They know their subnet EMA Taoflow is closer to 0, and they want you to drive more $TAO into their pool

Traditional KOL campaigns mean weeks of outreach, negotiations, and managing creators one by one

With Bitcast @Bitcast_network, you set the budget and brief, and the network starts publishing within the hour. Narrative-aligned content, in any language, at scale

693+ creators. 8.84M+ audience. No agency markups. No bottlenecks

TaoFlow makes new subnets harder to get $TAO into their pools

They need to drive more buys to draw TAO to their pools, either by encouraging people to buy their alpha tokens or by generating good revenue to buy back their alpha tokens

If they don't do either, no TAO will flow to their pool, and the alpha will be just an increasing number on paper, with no TAO backing it

Proof of TaoFlow

Dont work for elites and receive fiat

Work for the protocol and receive $TAO

Meet the CEO of @DeSciClaims, Philipp Koellinger @PKoellinger

->Full Professor at VU Amsterdam studying social science genetics & economics
->Published multiple times in Nature and Science, and secured a prestigious ERC grant
->Creator of SciWeave, an AI research engine that lets you search 250M+ scientific papers with verifiable, source-linked answers instead of black-box guesses

Now, he's diving deep into the Bittensor $TAO ecosystem on Subnet 111 Claims, a canonical claim-evidence graph built to solve science's biggest problem: hallucination

SN111 builds a decentralized claim-evidence graph with 0% hallucinations. It incentivizes unique data creation for drug discovery, defense R&D, and premium AI training models👀

I ran a $TAO simulation through multiple halvings, and there seems to be no way to drain or deregister the top subnets

Most TAO is already concentrated there. Could this become a problem?

Data Universe @Data_SN13 feels like one of the underrated subnets in Bittensor $TAO eco

The world's largest open-source social media dataset, efficient and easy to access for institutions

It's definitely one to put on your watchlist

I'm shaking right now knowing that the top subnets by market cap are regaining their emissions. Chutes @chutes_ai, Targon @TargonCompute, Lium @lium_io, Affine @affine_io, Score @webuildscore, and other leading subnets are seeing emissions return. This could be the beginning of Subnet Summer👀
